chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-7246 of 2022 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of CMA No.30739/2022. 2.For hearing of main case. 12.03.2025 Mr.Kashif Hanif, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Imran Ahmed Khan Abro, A.A.G.. Mr.Shamshad Narejo, Advocate for Respondent (S.R.B) Per learned counsel for the petitioner notice has been impugned herein, however, the same shall be contested before the issuing authority. Learned counsel seeks that the same be adjudicated vide speaking order and after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. He further seeks that pending the aforesaid no coercive action shall be taken against the petitioner. Learned counsel for the Respondent (S.R.B) articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that this petition may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
